summary: Start a replacement systems_architect writer for M7 strategic terrain schema after the first writer remained running without handoff or status response and was closed.

decisions.decision: Close the first systems_architect writer 019f1d9a-a51e-7101-8a6d-cf6dce788353 after repeated timeouts and no status response; start replacement writer 019f1dcb-dfb7-7e22-8e26-7be906522f91.
Maintain only one active schema writer to avoid overlapping edits in the same package/schema area.

risks.summary: The first writer stalled before producing a handoff.
risks.mitigation: Close the stalled writer, record the replacement, and continue with a single replacement writer using repository facts only.

requested_action: Replacement writer should continue M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-SCHEMA-001 and return the required REVIEW handoff.
